## Meeting Purpose

[Interview with Saasha Govender for a content writing position at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Saasha has extensive experience in healthcare, SEO, and technical writing, with a recent focus on business, marketing, SaaS, and AI content](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [She emphasizes balancing SEO with content quality, using client briefs and competitor analysis to guide her work](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Saasha is eager to upskill, particularly in areas like report analysis, AI integration, and management](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [She's comfortable with remote work, Slack communication, and managing multiple accounts/deadlines](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

## Topics

### Professional Background and Transition

  - [Started in healthcare (nursing, paramedics) 10-12 years ago](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Transitioned to research and writing, then expanded to marketing, business, SaaS, software, and technology](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [4-5 years of experience in business/marketing/tech content](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Worked with companies globally (UK, US, Australia, Europe)](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Evolved from writing to editing, quality analysis, and hybrid roles incorporating AI](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

### SEO and Content Quality Approach

  - [Balances SEO requirements with content quality](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Process: Start with keywords, conduct research, then inject quality](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Prioritizes meeting client needs in the first 300 words](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Uses client briefs, style guidelines, and competitor analysis to assess quality](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [For differentiation, suggests taking unique angles (e.g., lifestyle approach for sleep positions)](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Adapts content for specific audiences (e.g., data engineers vs. business analysts)](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### AI Integration in Writing Process

  - [Uses AI (like ChatGPT) for research and article outlines](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Emphasizes clear, concise prompts to get targeted information](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Open to learning more about streamlined AI usage in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)

### Team Integration and Career Goals

  - [Prefers team environment over freelancing](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Seeking consistency and daily team interactions](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [Aims to upskill in areas like report analysis, AI integration, and management](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Looking for long-term growth opportunities and to "set down roots" with a company](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

### Work Style and Communication Preferences

  - [Organized approach to managing multiple accounts and deadlines](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Uses both digital and paper-based task management systems](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Comfortable with Slack for communication](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [Prefers daily or weekly check-ins, not hourly micromanagement](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to enter interview notes into internal process](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Marilia to contact Saasha regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [If offered, Saasha could start in about a week or at the beginning of the next month](https://fathom.video/share/yDRSm2_5yUkp1gwZfxd2fnS6SgLxuYGx?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
